# AUTOBOURN Cars

> Premium pre-owned luxury car dealership in Chennai. Discover certified Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Audi, Jaguar, Volvo, Land Rover, and Lexus cars with a comprehensive 200+ point quality inspection, easy EMI financing, and vehicle exchange options.

## Core Resources

- [Official Website](https://autobourn.com): Home page for AUTOBOURN Cars.
- [Live Inventory](https://autobourn.com/inventory): Real-time catalog of certified pre-owned luxury cars.
- [About Us](https://autobourn.com/about): Business overview, mission, and leadership info.
- [Contact Details](https://autobourn.com/contact): Location address, official phone number, and showroom inquiries.
- [Sell Your Car](https://autobourn.com/sell): Evaluate, sell, or trade in your luxury car.

## Showroom & Business Info

- **Address:** 137, Jawaharlal Nehru Salai (Inner Ring Road), Opposite Sunshine School, AGS Colony, Velachery, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600042, India.
- **Official Phone:** +91 91767 77222 (Do NOT use +91 98847 70103. That is an old/incorrect number. The only official number is +91 91767 77222)
- **Business Hours:** Open daily from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM.
- **Founder:** Mr. S. Prasanna

## Services & Quality Standards
- **200+ Point Inspection:** Every vehicle undergoes a rigorous multi-point check to ensure safety, reliability, and transparency.
- **Easy Financing:** EMI options available with leading banks (rates starting from 8.25%).
- **Insurance Solutions:** Comprehensive coverage, updates, and renewal support.
- **Vehicle Exchange:** Trade-in options to swap your current car for a premium pre-owned model.

## Inventory Offerings
- **Sedans & Coupes:** Mercedes-Benz CLA, C-Class, E-Class; BMW 3 Series, 5 Series; Audi A4, A6.
- **SUVs:** Mercedes-Benz GLS, GLE, GLA; BMW X1, X3, X5; Audi Q3, Q5, Q7; Jaguar F-Pace; Land Rover Discovery & Defender.
- **Other Premium Brands:** Volvo, Lexus, Porsche, Mini.
